title: Usopp Chooses to Leave the Village Peacefully
description: On pages 7–10, the Syrup Village arc settles after Kuro’s defeat, focusing on Usopp’s decision, Kaya’s gratitude, and the end of the Usopp Pirates.
scene: The village chooses peace and secrecy while Usopp prepares to leave, turning his old lies into the beginning of a real journey.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Can you guys keep every- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: that has happened here as a secret?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What!? A secret?! but why would we do that?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's right!! We fought for the village!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Everyone will change their opinion of you, Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You could be the town's hero!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: USOPPP- San,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We have to fix the misunderstanding about you...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There's no misunder- standing,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: People would just say I'm a liar like I've always been

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's over now and I don't want to cause unneces- sary fright

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Besides what has has has had- pened today...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I think pirates wouldn't be interested in a small village like this...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And the villagers would be able to continue living their lives peacefully

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So, let's just say nothing happened

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: nothing happened,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It was all a lie

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: usopp- San...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I won't force it on you guys, but...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No, I can do that!! If that's what's best for this village!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Same here!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Me too!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I won't tell a soul!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Kaya,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is it going to be hard for you...?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Chirp

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Chirp

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey!! It's already 7 o'clock!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: My gosh, you're right!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I over- slept!! That's strange, usopp-kun didn't come today

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I wonder what HAP- penned to USOPPP-KUN

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Feels weird... throws my whole schedule off

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Dear, it's time for work

summary: This part gives Syrup Village an emotional farewell: Usopp protects the village’s peace, says goodbye to his friends, and steps toward becoming a real pirate.
